name: Lighter Box
description: All match win thresholds are +1 per copy owned.

name: Eager
description: At each match start one random die is pre-set to its max face — usable for sealing in round 1 without rolling.

name: Tab 9 Bounty
description: When tab 9 is sealed gain +1 HP per copy owned.

name: Bonus Seal
description: Every 3 rounds a bonus seal charges up. When you seal a tab, also seals half its value (rounded down) if open. No chain reactions.

name: Box Shutter
description: After a critical win the next match's win threshold is +2 per copy owned.

name: Phoenix Down
description: When your run would end from HP reaching 0 instead set HP to 1 and continue. Consumed on use.

name: Coffee Break
description: At each match start a random ability in your hand gains +1 charge per copy owned.

name: Survivor
description: After winning any match if your HP is exactly 1 gain +1 HP per copy owned.
